labs.name: Attack Speed
labs.unlock: unlocked with labs in Milestones at tier 1 wave 30. There are 99 levels. Each level increases the increments of each workshop level and maximum workshop value.

labs.name: Critical Factor
labs.unlock: unlocked with [[Lab Upgrades|lab]] in [[Milestones]] at tier 1 wave 30. There are 99 levels. Each level increase the increments of the critical factor workshop and the maximum workshop value.

labs.name: Damage
labs.unlock: unlock damage lab with [[Lab Upgrades|labs]] in [[Milestones]] at tier 1. The damage lab will increase the increments for each level and the maximum value in the workshop.

labs.name: Damage Per Meter
labs.unlock: Unlock [[Lab Upgrades|lab]] in [[Milestones]] at tier 3 wave 30. There are 99 levels in the lab. Each lab level increase the increments for each workshop level and raises the maximum workshop value.

labs.name: Range
labs.unlock: Unlock [[Lab Upgrades|lab]] in [[Milestones]] at tier 2 wave 30. There are 80 levels in the lab. Each level increases the increments of each workshop level and the maximum workshop value. The range lab screen has an adjuster that allows players to select the desired level up to what they have researched when not in a round.

labs.name: Rend Armor Max
labs.unlock: Unlock [[Lab Upgrades|lab]] in [[Milestones]] at tier 13 wave 10. Each level increases the maximum multiplier Rend Armor can apply
